creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
We ( haskell@ ) are planning to upgrade Haskell ports present in FreeBSD ports tree. For that, we need to rename couple of ports to match their upstream names:

- devel/hs-FileManip -> devel/hs-filemanip
- devel/lhs2TeX      -> textproc/hs-lhs2tex
- devel/bnfc         -> devel/hs-BNFC

Thanks
